summary: Supabase Cloud Storage integration testing completed successfully. All 12 tests passed. Product image uploads return Supabase CDN URLs (https://wkltyoesqjixpvjxjham.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/product-images/...), images are accessible via CDN, fabric/souvenir creation with images works correctly, and image deletion is triggered when products are deleted.

supabase_upload.test_02_uploaded_image_is_accessible: PASS - Images accessible via Supabase CDN (HTTP 200, content-type: image/jpeg)
supabase_upload.test_03_upload_with_different_folders: PASS - Uploads to fabrics, souvenirs, products folders work correctly
supabase_upload.test_04_upload_invalid_file_type_rejecte: PASS - Non-image files rejected with 400 status

fabric_with_image.test_05_create_fabric_with_supabase_imag: PASS - Fabric created with Supabase image URL stored correctly

souvenir_with_image.test_06_create_souvenir_with_supabase_im: PASS - Souvenir created with Supabase image URL stored correctly

image_deletion.test_07_delete_fabric_removes_supabase_i: PASS - Fabric deletion triggers Supabase image deletion
image_deletion.test_08_delete_souvenir_removes_supabase: PASS - Souvenir deletion triggers Supabase image deletion

cdn_verification.test_12_verify_existing_supabase_images_: PASS - Existing Supabase images in products are accessible

seed_data_creation: Test fabrics and souvenirs created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase Cloud Storage integration is fully functional. Image uploads return URLs in format: https://wkltyoesqjixpvjxjham.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/product-images/{folder}/{uuid}.{ext}. The storage_service.py handles uploads with fallback to local storage if Supabase fails. Delete operations properly clean up Supabase images.

verified_features.cdn_accessibility: Images accessible via Supabase CDN URLs
